home-page-container.title: The Great Controversy
home-page-container.subtitle: Discover the answers to the deepest questions about the fate of humanity. Download or receive at home the book that reveals the battle between good and evil, and how you can be prepared for the future.

quote-container.quote: The Lord impressed me to write this book in order that *without delay* it might be circulated in *every part* of the world, because the warnings it contains are necessary for preparing a people to stand in the day of the Lord.
quote-container.author: Ellen G. White

step-one.explanation: Present Project to Local Church Board

summary-container.paragraph-1: Do you think the world is getting better or worse? Unsurprisingly, a huge majority of people today believe the world is getting worse. Maybe this global pessimism is the result of a culture bathed in bad news, or maybe we inherently know the earthshaking truth presented at the heart of this book: Something is deeply wrong with our planet, and we are powerless to fix it.
summary-container.paragraph-2: The Great Controversy not only unveils the origin of human degradation, but also discloses the titanic struggle raging below the din of pandemics and peril, corruption and carnage, murder and mayhem. In this astonishing work you will discover that evil has a face, good has a Champion, and sin has an end. If you want to prepare for the end of this world and the glorious world to come, you must read this book.

distribution-package-container.paragraph-1: Are you ready to help share a message of hope? In this special distribution campaign for The Great Controversy, we offer a complete package of free promotional materials designed to support the outreach of this powerful message in your community.
distribution-package-container.paragraph-2: Download the complete package now and be part of this movement transforming lives! Get creative, engage your community, and help spread the message of The Great Controversy effectively.

book-available-formats-container.no-options: We don't have any download options for this language yet.

receive-at-home-container.title: Receive at home
receive-at-home-container.subtitle: Embrace transformation! Discover life-changing truths in The Great Controversy. Request your copy and find hope right at your doorstep.

study-guide.title: The Great Controversy — Chapter by Chapter
study-guide.subtitle: Follow each chapter at your own pace. Your progress is saved automatically.

esda-courses.title: ESDA Instituut Courses
esda-courses.summary: ESDA Instituut offers online and written courses on various topics such as health, theology and biblical studies, aiming to promote Bible knowledge in the Netherlands in an accessible and free way.

exit-intent.title: Want to receive this book for free?
exit-intent.body: Leave your email and we'll send you materials about The Great Controversy — a book that reveals the epic conflict between good and evil and where humanity is headed.
exit-intent.consent: I agree to receive emails with materials and updates about The Great Controversy. I can unsubscribe at any time.
exit-intent.success-body: Thank you! We'll send you updates and materials about The Great Controversy directly to your inbox.
exit-intent.error-email: Please enter a valid email address.
exit-intent.error-consent: Please confirm your consent to continue.
exit-intent.error-generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.

hero.title: Find Your Nearest Church
hero.subtitle: Discover Seventh-day Adventist communities across the Netherlands — allow location access to find the closest one, or explore all churches on the map.

map.subtitle: Allow location access to find the church nearest to you — or explore all communities on the map.

map.geoError: Location access denied — explore all churches on the map below.

directory.heading: All Communities
